name: Jedi Order
members: Obi-Wan Kenobi, Anakin Skywalker, Luke Skywalker
description: An ancient monastic, spiritual, and academic organization.
films: The Phantom Menace, Attack of the Clones, Revenge of the Sith, A New Hope, The Empire Strikes Back, Return of the Jedi

name: Sith Order
members: Darth Vader, Darth Maul, Darth Tyranus
description: A sect of Force-sensitive individuals who utilize the dark side of the Force.
films: The Phantom Menace, Attack of the Clones, Revenge of the Sith, A New Hope, The Empire Strikes Back, Return of the Jedi

name: Galactic Empire
description: An authoritarian government that replaced the Galactic Republic.
films: Revenge of the Sith, A New Hope, The Empire Strikes Back, Return of the Jedi

name: Rebel Alliance
members: Luke Skywalker, Han Solo, Lando Calrissian
description: An alliance of insurgent forces formed to oppose the Galactic Empire.
films: A New Hope, The Empire Strikes Back, Return of the Jedi

name: Galactic Republic
description: The democratic union that governed the galaxy for over 25,000 years.
films: The Phantom Menace, Attack of the Clones, Revenge of the Sith

name: Trade Federation
description: A commercial trade organization turned military force.
films: The Phantom Menace, Attack of the Clones, Revenge of the Sith

name: First Order
description: A military dictatorship that emerged from the fallen Galactic Empire.
films: The Force Awakens, The Last Jedi, The Rise of Skywalker

name: Resistance
description: A private military force that opposed the First Order.
films: The Force Awakens, The Last Jedi, The Rise of Skywalker

name: Imperial Security Bureau
description: Imperial intelligence and internal security agency.

name: Children of the Watch
description: Traditionalist Mandalorian covert following the Way of the Mandalore.

name: New Republic
description: Democratic government formed after the Galactic Civil War.

name: Imperial Remnant
description: Surviving Imperial factions after the Battle of Endor.

name: The Hidden Path
description: Underground network helping Jedi and Force-sensitive people escape the Empire.

name: Aldhani Rebel Cell
description: Small rebel team that attacked the Imperial garrison on Aldhani.

name: Nite Owls
description: Mandalorian faction associated with Bo-Katan Kryze.
films: The Mandalorian, Star Wars: The Clone Wars
